title: ornithogalum pyrenaicum subsp. sphaerocarpum
intro: Ornithogalum pyrenaicum subsp. sphaerocarpum, also known as the Pyrenean star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to the Pyrenees and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications. However, its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional, as more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
